heading: Limitation on allowance authority of Committee on House Oversight
label: 4314 Limitation on allowance authority of Committee on House Oversight
notes: References in TextThe General Schedule, referred to in subsec. (a)(3), is set out under , Government Organization and Employees.section 5332 of Title 5

CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 57a of this titleSection is based on House Resolution No. 1372, § 1, Ninety-fourth Congress, , which was enacted into permanent law by .July 1, 1976Pub. L. 94–440

Amendments1996— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section consisted of subsecs. (a) and (b) relating to limitations on authority of the Committee on House Administration to fix and adjust allowances.Pub. L. 104–186

Change of NameCommittee on House Oversight of House of Representatives changed to Committee on House Administration of House of Representatives by House Resolution No. 5, One Hundred Sixth Congress, .Jan. 6, 1999
amendments: Amendments1996— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section consisted of subsecs. (a) and (b) relating to limitations on authority of the Committee on House Administration to fix and adjust allowances.Pub. L. 104–186

children.text: a change in the price of materials, services, or office space;
a technological change or other improvement in office equipment; or
an increase under in rates of pay under the General Schedule.section 5303 of title 5

children.heading: Resolution requirement
children.label: b Resolution requirement
children.text: In the case of reasons other than the reasons specified in paragraph (1), (2), or (3) of subsection (a), the fixing and adjustment of the allowances of the House of Representatives in the categories described in the provision of law specified in subsection (c) may be carried out only by resolution of the House of Representatives.

children.heading: Provision specified
children.label: c Provision specified
children.text: The provision of law referred to in subsections (a) and (b) is .section 4313 of this title
